# Sayane External Profile for ChatGPT

## Metadata

- Source: Sayane external profile
- LLM memory: false
- Generated: 2026-06-05T05:31:12Z
- Target: ChatGPT
- Format: markdown
- Scopes: identity, interaction

## How to Use This Context

This profile is external context supplied by Sayane. It is not ChatGPT memory. Use it to guide responses within this session, while respecting explicit uncertainty and avoiding unsupported assumptions.

- Preferred name: example
- Roles: developer

- Tone: precise, logical

## Export Policy Notes

- Some private or sensitive fields may be omitted.
- `promptExport: never` fields are not included.
